Remote: origin git@github.com:juequinterore/aconcagua.git — no issue_json.git.repository constraint, proceeding.
Git status at start: branch chore/add_blog_discovery_link, clean (untracked agents/ and specs/ only).

Phase 1 — Data/Model (3 files, +2 lines each):
  - src/i18n/es.ts: Added nav.blog='Blog' and nav.blog_aria='Blog (se abre en una pestaña nueva)' after nav.cta key.
  - src/i18n/en.ts: Added nav.blog='Blog' and nav.blog_aria='Blog (opens in a new tab)' after nav.cta key.
  - src/i18n/zh.ts: Added nav.blog='博客' and nav.blog_aria='博客（在新标签页中打开）' after nav.cta key.
  All three locales have both new keys in parity.

Phase 2 — Implementation (2 files):
  - src/components/Nav.astro: Extended navLinks type to include optional external/ariaKey fields; appended Blog entry as last item. Updated desktop .nav-links map and mobile .nav-overlay ul map to branch on link.external — renders anchor with target=_blank, rel=noopener noreferrer, aria-label, and inline 12×12 SVG external-link icon (aria-hidden=true, currentColor). Added .nav-link-external-icon scoped CSS rule.
  - src/components/Footer.astro: Same navLinks type extension + Blog entry appended. Updated Navigation column .footer-links map with the same external-link branch. Added .footer-link-external-icon scoped CSS rule. Added display:inline-flex+align-items:center to .footer-links a to align icon with text.

Phase 3 — Integration/Exposure:
  All 6 pages (es, en, zh landing pages + privacy pages) already mount <Nav> and <Footer>; no per-page edits required.
  Built HTML confirmed: each locale page contains 3 occurrences of blog.aconcagua.co (desktop nav + mobile overlay + footer).
  Aria-labels verified per locale:
    ES: 'Blog (se abre en una pestaña nueva)'
    EN: 'Blog (opens in a new tab)'
    ZH: '博客（在新标签页中打开）'
  All anchors carry target=_blank and rel=noopener noreferrer.

Phase 4 — Validation:
  npm run build completed with exit 0, zero @astrojs/check errors, zero warnings.
  7 pages built successfully.
